name: privileged-info-distillation
paperTitle: Privileged Information Distillation for Language Models
content:
## Introduction

Teacher model sees extra information; student learns to predict teacher outputs without privileged info, effectively internalizing its insights. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Teacher model sees extra information; student learns to predict teacher outputs without privileged info, effectively internalizing its insights.

## Architecture Overview

```
Input
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 1]
  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]
  │   └─ Refinement
  │
  └─→ Output
```
